title: If I Speak a Foreign Tongue

verses.text: If all learning I approve and my faith can mountains move, All these gifts still nothing prove If I have not love.
If I give away all gain, Suffer martyrdom in pain, Nothing yet do I attain If I have not love.
Love is patient, love is kind; Love rejects an evil mind. Jealousy is left behind If I have this love.
Love is endless in its reign, Though all tongues and knowledge wane. Faith and hope and love remain; Greatest still is love.
